case_title: CENTRAVEL, INC. VS. RICHARD L BRENT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-25-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRENT, RICHARD L
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION W0712120A006 FOR ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT
LETTER RECEIVED FROM PLAINTIFF DATED 2/10/12 RE REASON FOR STOP PAYMENT OF THE CHECK.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CENTRAVEL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRENT, RICHARD L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CENTRAVEL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRENT, RICHARD L $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
